title: Membership Tier
description: A level within a loyalty program structured ranking system that offers escalating benefits and exclusive perks.

id.description: Unique identifier for the membership tier.

name.description: The human-readable name of the tier (e.g., “Platinum”).

level.description: The relative ranking or numerical level of the tier within the loyalty program.

conditions.description: List of conditions to gain eligibility for the tier.

benefits.description: List of possible benefits associated with this tier.

links.description: URLs for detailed fine prints of tier (including sign-up requirements, benefits summary, terms of service, etc.).
